parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML and obvious encoding issues while preserving the historical text structure. Main fixes: (1) corrected mismatched closing tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE> in the 'Satyrische Gedichte' entry; (2) escaped '&' in 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to '&'; (3) normalized multiple mojibake sequences (e.g., 'B√ºcher'→'Bücher', 'St√§helins'→'Stähelins', 'Eydgno√ºschafft'→'Eydgnöschafft', '√º'→'ß', '√†'→'†', '4t√≤/8v√≤'→'4t°/8v°'); and (4) kept/additionally preserved consistent bibliographic tagging (<BIBL>, <AUTHOR>, <TITLE>, <FORMAT>, <VOLUME>, <PRIZE>) without altering record boundaries.
